selections.name: Big Lew
selections.reason: Projects to get a perfect stalking trip tracking the two early speeds; pace setup favors his running style.

selections.name: Temple Hall
selections.reason: Strong early speed figures and draws inside; will be the one to catch but may face pressure.

selections.name: Baytown Anubis
selections.reason: Another presser who benefits from the contested pace scenario; consistent speed figures.

selections.name: Glorious Revenge
selections.reason: Has early speed but draws outside and carries 115 lbs after the change; will need to work to cross over.

danger_horse.name: Wampanoag Chief
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could allow him to save ground and pick up pieces if the leaders duel too hard.

selections.name: Heaven's Champion
selections.reason: Class disparity cap applied but still holds a significant speed advantage over this field; prime inside draw.

selections.name: Miah Said
selections.reason: Consistent presser who fits well at this level; weight changed to 115 lbs but remains a strong contender.

selections.name: Lemon Twist
selections.reason: Projects as the lone early speed in this field; gets a +5 pace bonus and could wire them if left alone.

selections.name: Bourbononaholiday
selections.reason: Solid recent form and speed figures suggest he can hit the board with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Swift Attraction
danger_horse.reason: Presser who could capitalize if the lone speed falters late.

selections.name: Cotton
selections.reason: Elite speed figures and gets a +2 presser bonus in a race with honest pace; rail draw is perfect.

selections.name: Last American Exit
selections.reason: Strong class and speed; will be tracking right alongside the top choice and is a major threat.

selections.name: Fifty B M G
selections.reason: One of the early speeds; has the class to hold on for a share but may be softened up early.

selections.name: La Belleza Negra
selections.reason: The other half of the early pace scenario; will need to put away #5 to have a shot at the end.

danger_horse.name: Pat's Gamble
danger_horse.reason: Sustained closer who could pick up the pieces if the early duel becomes too taxing.

selections.name: Lazio
selections.reason: Takes a pace penalty due to multiple speeds, but base class and speed are so high he still tops the ratings.

selections.name: Proud Ronin
selections.reason: Perfectly drawn outside to stalk the expected pace meltdown; strong class figures.

selections.name: Commander At Sea
selections.reason: Inside draw and presser style gives him a great trip behind the dueling leaders.

selections.name: Short Story Long
selections.reason: Gets a massive +5 closer bonus due to the projected pace meltdown; excellent value underneath.

danger_horse.name: Imperial Gold
danger_horse.reason: Part of the early speed brigade; dangerous if he manages to clear the others easily.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #2, Exacta Box 2-7, Trifecta 2,7 / 1,2,6,7 / ALL

selections.name: Heat Merchant
selections.reason: Gets a presser bonus in a moderately contested pace; strong recent figures make him the one to beat.

selections.name: Napa Spirit (ire)
selections.reason: Tied for top rating; outside draw allows for a clean stalking trip and he has the class to finish the job.

selections.name: Truly Mischief
selections.reason: Early speed horse who avoids the disparity cap; will be dangerous if he gets loose on the lead.

selections.name: Rye's My Guy
selections.reason: Another presser who benefits from the setup; consistent and should be in the mix late.

danger_horse.name: Always A Way
danger_horse.reason: Solid speed figures and avoids the cap; capable of springing an upset at a price.

selections.name: Second City Saint
selections.reason: Projects as the lone early speed with #5 scratched; gets a +5 pace bonus and should control the race.

selections.name: Irish Lullaby
selections.reason: Solid base speed and class; will be tracking the lone speed and gets first run.

selections.name: Melody Maker
selections.reason: Good class rating and should appreciate the synthetic surface; a strong exotic inclusion.

selections.name: Pepper Patch
selections.reason: High class rating but speed figures are slightly behind the top choices; rail draw helps.

danger_horse.name: Miss Maxine
danger_horse.reason: Classy filly who could improve significantly in this spot.

selections.name: Arbiter
selections.reason: Massive speed and class advantage over this short field; the clear standout.

selections.name: Two Out Hero
selections.reason: The main danger to the top choice; has strong early speed and will keep the favorite honest.

selections.name: Silver Is Best
selections.reason: Gets a presser bonus tracking the two speeds; should comfortably grab a share.

selections.name: El Capo
selections.reason: Lowest rated of the remaining runners; will need others to falter to hit the board.

selections.name: Ice Chocolat (brz)
selections.reason: Massive standout on speed figures (121 base + 2 presser bonus); class of the field and drawn perfectly outside.

selections.name: Crumlin Lad
selections.reason: Excellent presser setup and strong base figures make him the clear second choice.

selections.name: The Great Oz
selections.reason: High class rating and gets the same favorable pace setup as the top two.

selections.name: Arabian Prince
selections.reason: Early speed who will be prominent early; has the class to hold on for a minor award.

danger_horse.name: Wyoming Bill
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner who fits well at this level and can close late.
